method: Import with Studio CLI 0.9.2; patch project metadata; export with Studio CLI 0.10.1; normalize (strip random source_build_id, restore original asset_id/lineage/creator/review disclosures, set current compiler/conformance facts); rebuild checksums from directory content; repack. Dual independent export runs produce byte-identical final artifacts.

identity_preservation.review_statement: AI author review only; no human review or expert endorsement occurred.

semantic_preservation.profile_note: Payload format changed from judgment-profile-v1 to kdna.payload.judgment 0.1.0; structural CBOR differs but judgment-core content and cards are preserved.
semantic_preservation.card_id_digest: dc9e1fbcc763fa35… (see rebuild script output for full canonical)
semantic_preservation.card_comparison_note: Card IDs are compared within the same payload profile. The source (judgment-profile-v1) and rebuilt (kdna.payload.judgment) CBOR structures differ; card-level comparison within the compiled project (studio.project.json) shows 85/85 and 87/87 cards preserved but is not a machine-readable cross-profile CBOR diff.
